Title: Log In with a Valid Student Account
Objective: Verify student with email belonging to @student.passerellesnumeriques.org domain logs in successfully to Student Portal via Google OAuth.
Preconditions: User is not logged into system. Browser is connected to internet and supports Google OAuth.
ExpectedResult: Login successful. System recognizes student role and redirects directly to Student Portal interface showing student's academic records.

Title: Log In with an Organization Staff Account
Objective: Verify Staff account logging in via Google OAuth is automatically recognized and redirected to Staff Portal instead of Student Portal.
Preconditions: User is not logged into system.
ExpectedResult: Login successful. System recognizes Staff role and redirects user to Staff Portal interface instead of Student Portal.

Title: Log In with an External Personal Account
Objective: Verify system blocks access when user attempts to log in with an external personal email domain.
Preconditions: User is not logged into system.
ExpectedResult: System blocks login. Error message appears: "Access denied. Please use your organizational email (@passerellesnumeriques.org or @student.passerellesnumeriques.org)."

Title: Log In with Valid Student Email but Without Academic Records in System
Objective: Verify system handles student authentication when email domain is valid but student profile is missing from database.
Preconditions: User has valid student email domain, but student profile record does not exist in database.
Steps: 1. Log in via Google OAuth with newstudent@student.passerellesnumeriques.org.
ExpectedResult: System authenticates but displays notice: "No academic records found for your account. Please contact Academic Staff."

Title: Switch Between Semesters (Semester Selector)
Objective: Verify student can switch between semesters using dropdown menu and view corresponding subject grades and GPA.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal. Academic record contains data for Semester 1 and Semester 2.
ExpectedResult: Interface re-renders smoothly. Grade table and GPA stats update instantly to display Semester 2 academic data.

Title: Verify Subject Categorization by Category (Subject Categories)
Objective: Verify subjects on Student Portal are grouped into correct categories (IT, English, Professional Skills).
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal. Student has enrolled subjects across multiple categories.
Steps:
1. Navigate to Grade Report tab on Student Portal;
2. Observe layout of subject table.
ExpectedResult: Subjects are grouped clearly under Category header sections (IT, English, Professional Skills).

Title: Verify Read-Only Nature of Student Portal
Objective: Verify Student Portal is strictly Read-Only and provides no edit controls for grades or attendance.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal.
Steps:
1. Browse all sections of Student Portal (Grades, Attendance, Profile, Materials);
2. Check for any edit, save, or input fields.
ExpectedResult: All academic data displays in Read-Only mode. No input fields or save buttons are present.

Title: Display Unentered Grades (Empty Grades)
Objective: Verify system displays hyphen placeholder "-" when a grade component has not been entered yet.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal. Final Exam grade for subject "Web Dev" has not been entered by Staff.
Steps:
1. View grade details for subject "Web Dev";
2. Check cell display for Final Exam grade.
ExpectedResult: Cell displays "-" placeholder instead of 0 or blank, indicating grade is pending.

Title: Color Code Final Grade (/10) for Excellent Grade (>= 8.0)
Objective: Verify final subject grade >= 8.0 displays in Green badge styling.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal.
Steps:
1. Locate subject "Algorithms" with final grade 8.5;
2. Inspect badge color.
ExpectedResult: Grade 8.5 displays in Green badge styling (#137333 / light green fill).

Title: Color Code Final Grade (/10) for Good/Average Grade (5.5 - 7.9)
Objective: Verify final subject grade between 5.5 and 7.9 displays in Orange/Yellow badge styling.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal.
Steps:
1. Locate subject "Database" with final grade 6.5;
2. Inspect badge color.
ExpectedResult: Grade 6.5 displays in Orange/Yellow badge styling (#B06000 / light yellow fill).

Title: Color Code Final Grade (/10) for Failing Grade (< 5.5)
Objective: Verify final subject grade < 5.5 displays in Red badge styling.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal.
Steps:
1. Locate subject "English 1" with final grade 4.0;
2. Inspect badge color.
ExpectedResult: Grade 4.0 displays in Red badge styling (#A50E0E / light red fill).

Title: Color Code GPA (/4) for Excellent GPA (>= 3.5)
Objective: Verify semester GPA >= 3.5 displays in Green highlight styling.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal.
Steps:
1. View GPA Summary card on Student Portal;
2. Inspect GPA badge color.
ExpectedResult: GPA 3.65 displays with Green text/background styling.

Title: Color Code GPA (/4) for Good/Average GPA (2.0 - 3.4)
Objective: Verify semester GPA between 2.0 and 3.4 displays in Orange/Yellow highlight styling.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal.
Steps:
1. View GPA Summary card on Student Portal;
2. Inspect GPA badge color.
ExpectedResult: GPA 2.85 displays with Orange/Yellow text/background styling.

Title: Color Code GPA (/4) for Low GPA (< 2.0)
Objective: Verify semester GPA < 2.0 displays in Red highlight styling.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal.
Steps:
1. View GPA Summary card on Student Portal;
2. Inspect GPA badge color.
ExpectedResult: GPA 1.75 displays with Red text/background styling.

Title: Display Retake/Re-study Badge for Retaken Course
Objective: Verify system displays a clear "Re-study" or "Retake" badge next to subjects flagged for re-study.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal. Subject "Networking" is flagged as Re-study.
Steps:
1. View subject list for current semester;
2. Inspect row for subject "Networking".
ExpectedResult: Subject row displays a prominent "Re-study" badge next to course name.

Title: Display Internship Report Shortcut when Internship Group Is Active (On-going)
Objective: Verify system displays Internship Report shortcut button on Student Portal header when student belongs to an active internship group.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal. Student belongs to an internship group with status "On-going".
Steps:
1. Open Student Portal home page;
2. Check header navigation bar.
ExpectedResult: Internship Report shortcut button is visible and clicking it opens bi-weekly report submission module.

Title: Hide Internship Report Shortcut when Internship Group Status Is Not On-going
Objective: Verify system hides Internship Report shortcut button when internship group status is Completed or Archived.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal. Student belongs to an internship group with status "Completed".
Steps:
1. Open Student Portal home page;
2. Check header navigation bar.
ExpectedResult: Internship Report shortcut button is hidden from header.

Title: Hide Internship Report Shortcut when Student Is Not Assigned to Any Internship Group
Objective: Verify system hides Internship Report shortcut button when student has not been assigned to any internship group.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal. Student is not in any internship group.
Steps:
1. Open Student Portal home page;
2. Check header navigation bar.
ExpectedResult: Internship Report shortcut button is completely hidden from header.

Title: Verify Data Isolation Between Students (Data Isolation)
Objective: Verify student can only view their own grades and cannot access academic records of other students.
Preconditions: Student A (ST001) is logged into Student Portal.
ExpectedResult: Student A sees strictly ST001 records. Attempting to tamper URL parameters returns 403 Forbidden or redirects to own profile.

Title: Block Direct API Calls for Unauthenticated Grade Retrieval
Objective: Verify backend grade fetch API rejects requests lacking valid session JWT token.
Preconditions: Unauthenticated user.
Steps: 1. Submit direct HTTP GET request to grade API without Authorization header.
ExpectedResult: Backend rejects request with HTTP 401 Unauthorized.

Title: Verify Interface Rendering on Mobile Devices (Responsive UI)
Objective: Verify Student Portal layout adapts cleanly to small screen viewports (smartphones/tablets).
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal. Browser viewport set to 375px width (iPhone dimensions).
Steps:
1. Resize viewport to 375px width;
2. Inspect grade table, cards, navigation bar, and buttons.
ExpectedResult: Layout stacks vertically without horizontal scroll overflow. Table scrolls smoothly or collapses into cards cleanly.

Title: Verify Behavior when Session Expires (Google Sign-Out / Session Expiry)
Objective: Verify system redirects student to login page when session token expires.
Preconditions: Student session token has expired after period of inactivity.
Steps: 1. Perform action on Student Portal after session expiration.
ExpectedResult: System clears session state, displays notification "Session expired. Please sign in again", and redirects to login page.

Title: Verify Validation of Invalid Semester Parameter (Semester Validation)
Objective: Verify system handles invalid or non-existent semester parameters in URL gracefully.
Preconditions: Student is logged into Student Portal.
Steps: 1. Navigate to Student Portal URL with parameter semester=999.
ExpectedResult: System defaults to current active semester without crashing or throwing unhandled exception.
